title: これが私のウマドル道☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Up on stage, the winner of today's race is holding
a concert to celebrate.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hey, everyoooone! Thanks for all your support!
I'll definitely see you here again next time!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Wooooo!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon's concert ends in an eruption of
applause.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Now that the concert is over, I figure I should
head back to the academy, but...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Ryan! Thanks for waiting! Sorry for being late. I
had to clean up.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Great performance today! You came just in time.
The next bus is the last one back to school.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: But anyways, your concert was a massive success!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, but I wish that last dance move had gone a
bit better.

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Really? Hmm, wait. Falco, look behind you...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon looks back and sees a young
Umamusume facing her.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Um, hi, Falco! I was in the front row at your
concert! You were so pretty and cute and sparkly!
It was amazing!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Aww, you were watching?! I'm so happy!

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
Even though I'm an Umamusume, I'm really slow. I
got really depressed and thought I was no good.

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text:
But watching your concert made me feel good
again! I want to race again! And I wanna dance
like you, Falco!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Oh! I see... You're just like...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Hehe... I see, I see! Well, isn't that a beautiful
dream!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I know! How would you like to have a dance
lesson with me right now?

text_block_list.name: Young Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Really?! Yes, please!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Smart Falcon teaches the little girl some simple
dance moves.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
See you later! I'm sure we'll both be dancing on
stage together one day! ☆

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Beaming with satisfaction, the young fan leaves
with her parents.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Smart Falcon is overjoyed. However...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Oh crap! Sorry, Ryan. We missed the last bus
home, didn't we?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Ahaha, no worries! It's just a two-hour run back.
It'll make for some fine exercise!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Besides, who could blame you after seeing that
girl's smile?

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ryan... Hehe, thanks a lot.

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
I want to see all my fans' sparkling dreams come
true! That's the path I lead! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
It's incredible how much your concerts touch
people's hearts! I really admire how you do that!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Y-you admire me?! Wait, does that mean you
want to be an Umadol?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Then do it! Let's be Umadols together!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Uh, no... that's not... quite what I meant...

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
You have a well-built physique and a natural
smile!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: That's all you need. You'd be great! ☆

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: How about we shine together?! We can be a unit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: ...Oh, would you look at the time?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Hey, wait up!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: Ryaaaaan!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
I know that look! That determination! That
passion! It's just like me and weightlifting!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: ...Huh? Weight...lifting?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Weightlifting requires an unyielding spirit and
unrelenting perseverance!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
And you have both! Yes, I knew from the start I
could sense a fellow spirit!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text: Well? You wanna train with me?!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text:
Um, well, I, uh... I think my muscles are pretty
sore today, so...

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
They're sore! That means they're getting bigger!
It's proof of your progress!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Soreness equals progress! It's our chance! Forget
tomorrow, let's do it today! No! Let's do it now!

text_block_list.name: Smart Falcon
text_block_list.text: P-please, noooo!

text_block_list.name: Mejiro Ryan
text_block_list.text:
Oh, you're already doing some leg exercises?! All
right! I can't slack off either!
